title: Let It Be - Practice Listening and Understanding
prompt: Listen to the lyrics and fill in the missing words: 'When I find myself in times of ______, Mother Mary comes to me.'
hint: The missing word means difficulties or problems.
sample: When I find myself in times of trouble, Mother Mary comes to me.

ja.hint: The missing word means difficulties or problems.

zh.hint: 缺少的單字表示困難或麻煩。

title: Let It Be - Understanding Key Phrases
prompt: What phrase does Mother Mary speak to the singer? Fill in the blank: 'Speaking words of ______, Let it be.'
hint: The phrase means wise advice or guidance.
sample: Speaking words of wisdom, Let it be.

ja.prompt: What phrase does Mother Mary speak to the singer? Fill in the blank: 'Speaking words of ______, Let it be.'
ja.hint: The phrase means wise advice or guidance.
ja.sample: Speaking words of wisdom, Let it be.

zh.prompt: 瑪利亞對歌手說了什麼話？填入空格：'說出______的話，讓它成真。'
zh.hint: 這個短語表示明智的建議或指導。
zh.sample: 說出智慧的話，讓它成真。

en: {'prompt': "What phrase does Mother Mary speak to the singer? Fill in the blank: 'Speaking words of ______, Let it be.'", 'hint': 'The phrase means wise advice or guidance.', 'sample': 'Speaking words of wisdom, Let it be.'}

title: Let It Be - Recognizing Repeated Phrases
prompt: Complete the repeated phrase: 'Let it __, let it __.'
hint: The phrase is repeated several times in the song and means to allow things to happen naturally.
sample: Let it be, let it be.

title: Let It Be - Understanding Hope in the Lyrics

sample: There will be an answer, let it be.
